name: The Hollow Vein
description: Follow the Ashen Road through an abandoned mining settlement where the dead still work beneath a soot-dark sky.

name: Gravebloom Wood
objective: Find the source of the waking roots
description: A drowned forest has begun growing toward Blackfen. Its paths will open after the Hollow Vein is broken.

name: The Sable Coast
objective: Reach the lighthouse beyond the dead tide
description: Salt-black ruins and a drowned road await beyond the forest.
